name: DocuSign CLM (Contract Lifecycle Management) API
what_it_does: DocuSign CLM REST API for contract lifecycle management and agreement automation. Enables AI agents to manage contract template creation and document generation for sales and legal automation, handle contract negotiation and redlining workflow for deal execution, access clause library management and intelligent clause suggestions for contract drafting, retrieve contract approval routing and delegation workflow for authorization management, manage contract obligation tracking and milestone alerting for compliance monitoring, handle contract renewal and expiration management for portfolio management, access contract analytics and risk scoring for contract intelligence, retrieve e-signature integration with DocuSign eSignature for execution workflow, manage repository search and contract discovery for legal operations, and integrate DocuSign CLM data with Salesforce, SAP, and ERP revenue systems.
use_cases: Generating contracts from sales automation agents
Managing contract approvals from legal workflow agents
Tracking obligations from contract compliance agents
Automating renewals from contract portfolio agents
not_for: Simple e-signature without contract lifecycle management
Small businesses without enterprise contract volume
Non-contract legal operations without CLM workflow focus
best_when: An enterprise legal or sales operations team using DocuSign CLM wants AI agents to automate contract generation, negotiation workflow, obligation tracking, and renewal management integrated with the broader DocuSign Agreement Cloud.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: Contract execution via DocuSign CLM creates legally binding obligations — automated contract generation without attorney review for non-standard terms creates unauthorized commitment risk. Automated e-signature execution requires authorized signatory validation per corporate delegation of authority. DocuSign CLM AI clause suggestions may introduce non-standard terms; all AI-generated contract language requires legal review before execution. DocuSign CLM (acquired SpringCM 2018) and DocuSign eSignature are separate APIs requiring separate authentication flows.

auth.notes: DocuSign CLM uses OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code and JWT Grant). Developer portal at developers.docusign.com. Webhooks for CLM workflow events. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ (DocuSign). Public (DOCU NASDAQ). DocuSign acquired SpringCM (CLM) in 2018 for $220M. DocuSign CLM is distinct from DocuSign eSignature with separate API. 1M+ enterprise customers. DocuSign Agreement Cloud bundles CLM and eSignature. Competes with Ironclad, Icertis, and Conga for enterprise CLM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user and CLM module
pricing.notes: San Francisco. DocuSign (DOCU NASDAQ). CLM via SpringCM acquisition 2018. 1M+ enterprise customers. Agreement Cloud: CLM + eSignature + Notary. Competes with Ironclad, Icertis, Conga CLM, and Agiloft for enterprise CLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per account type

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: DocuSign CLM automated contract execution creates legally binding commitments; automated e-signature without authorized signatory validation creates unauthorized obligation liability
CLM vs. eSignature separate APIs — DocuSign CLM (SpringCM heritage) and DocuSign eSignature use separate authentication flows and API base URLs; both must be configured for complete contract workflow
AI clause suggestion review — DocuSign CLM AI clause library suggestions are templates, not legal advice; automated contract generation requires attorney review for non-standard or high-risk terms
Delegation of authority — corporate DOA policies define who can execute contracts of what value; automated signature routing must enforce DOA thresholds
Contract metadata accuracy — DocuSign CLM obligation extraction relies on AI; critical obligation dates and payment terms require human validation for financial and compliance tracking
SpringCM nomenclature — DocuSign CLM documentation may reference SpringCM terms; CLM API base URLs and namespace may reflect SpringCM heritage
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise CLM. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Contract and agreement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise CLM. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Contract and legal data.
